title: macroptilium cochleatum
intro: Macroptilium cochleatum, also known as snail bean or jackbean, is a type of legume native to tropical America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Macroptilium cochleatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its seeds can be used as a source of protein and other nutrients.
